title: Oxygen
description:
One of the BEST optimization modpacks!                    
It offers maximum  performance with shaders, fullbright and zoom!
body:
## The pack:

This modpack is made to get good FPS even on low end devices, while still retaining  the very essential QoL mods like zoom&fullbright. 

**It would be helpful if you could follow the project :)**  

## Updates:

It is updated as soon as i have time for it or it's logical.  
> **This is usually 1-7 days.**  

## Features:
>▶️╏**Good performance**  
>▶️╏**Native wayland(wayGL) support**  
>▶️╏**Fullbright**  
>▶️╏**Zoom**  
>▶️╏**Shader compatibility**    
>▶️╏**Individual volume controll***   
>▶️╏**Updates don't override YOUR configs!**  
>▶️╏**Preconfigured mods and options**  
>▶️╏**Searchable keybinds**  
>▶️╏**Default texture pack profiles**  
>▶️╏**Fast updates!**  

## Other info

<summary>Support&Contacting me:</summary>
